description: Adobe Experience Manager as a Cloud Service is Adobe’s hosted content management platform for managing website content, assets, cloud environments, and related governance or migration workflows. The `mcp.adobeaemcloud.com` host serves Adobe-hosted MCP endpoints that let supported AI clients interact with those AEM capabilities under a user’s existing Adobe and AEM permissions.
summary: Adobe Experience Manager on mcp.adobeaemcloud.com exposes streamable HTTP MCP servers for AEM, including the cataloged `/adobe/mcp/aem` endpoint plus documented Content, Content Read-only, Cloud Manager, Experience Governance, and Cloud Migration MCP endpoints; they authenticate via Adobe IMS user OAuth through the MCP client.
